search_summary.location: Sankarankovil, Tenkasi District, Tamil Nadu, Pincode 627756
search_summary.note: Sankarankovil is a small town (~50,000 population). No dedicated wholesale-only optical businesses were found within the town. All optical businesses found are primarily retail-focused optician shops. However, some may also serve as dealers/distributors for nearby areas. Nearby towns within 10-15km (Tenkasi) and larger regional hubs (Rajapalayam, Tirunelveli) were also included where they may serve Sankarankovil area.

shops.address: 249, Rajapalayam Road, Opp To IOB Bank, Sankarankoil, Sankarankovil - 627756, Tamil Nadu
shops.wholesale_relevance: HIGH - Authorized dealer of Rayban, Fastrack, Velocity Lenses (Essilor, Beauty Corning, Pixel), Contact Lenses (Bausch+Lomb, Spano-Silk). GST registered proprietorship. Handles lens fitting with auto edger equipment. Serves Sankarankoil & Tirunelveli region.

recommendations: 1. Vision Care Optics and Smart Opticals in Sankarankovil are the best starting points - both have wholesale-related listings.
2. Tenkasi (~12km) has Justdial-listed 'Optical Wholesalers' - visit justdial.com directly for complete listings as pages are JavaScript-rendered.
3. Star Optical in Rajapalayam (~50km) is listed on IndiaMART as a wholesale supplier of frames and sunglasses.
4. For larger wholesale quantities, contact national B2B suppliers like GKB Optic, Aditya Opticals, Yash Optics, or Optic Souq who serve Tamil Nadu.
5. Lofty Optical Industries is based in Tamil Nadu and supplies leading eye hospitals and retail chains.
